message:
bd-3bxhj.5.3: Add missing ftui-runtime capabilities for migration parity

New modules:
- cancellation: CancellationToken/CancellationSource for cooperative task cancellation
- process_subscription: ProcessSubscription wrapping std::process::Command as Subscription
- retry: RetryPolicy with Fixed/Exponential/Linear backoff, task_with_timeout, task_with_retry

Model trait lifecycle hooks:
- on_shutdown(): cleanup commands before runtime exit
- on_error(): error recovery commands for runtime errors

39 new tests covering all three modules. Clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
